author: y4rr
content: Resolved: ResNet50Dilated rewritten as a thin wrapper around resnet::resnet50_dilated([false, true, true]) (Option a per the dispatch). Forward path uses IntermediateFeatures::forward_features('layer4') (FCN's exact pattern). The standard Bottleneck inherited from resnet.rs threads previous_dilation correctly: layer3[0]=dil 1, layer3[1..]=dil 2, layer4[0]=dil 2, layer4[1..]=dil 4. DilatedBottleneck struct + make_dilated_layer + make_bottleneck_layer + run_layer + collect_params*/named_layer_params helpers removed (now dead). Test-side state_remap simplified — bn2 → conv2.bn rewrite removed (Bottleneck exposes bn2.<...> natively, identical to torchvision); backbone keys pass through verbatim. Loader rejection probes (4) all preserved. value-parity now PASSes: max_abs_err=8.941e-6 vs abs_tol=1.000e-3 (well within band, ~100× margin). Down from 9.085e-2 (pre-fix, 10× out of band).
